stemHtml: An aircraft operating within airspace Class G, under VFR and above 10 000 ft shall maintain a distance from clouds of at least...

options.a: 1 NM horizontally, 1000 ft vertically, and a flight visibility of at least 8 km.
options.b: 1 NM horizontally, 1000 ft vertically, and a flight visibility of at least 5 km.
options.c: 1500 m horizontally, 1000 ft vertically, and a flight visibility of at least 8 km.
options.d: 1500 m horizontally, 1000 ft vertically, and a flight visibility of at least 5 km.
